raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a XXXX gift card for {$200.00} on XX/XX/year> from Home Depot using my Home Depot credit card. I tried to use it and the card declined. I called the issuer and was told the balance never loaded from the store. I went to the store and spoke with the manager who said I would need to dispute the charge. I did so the same day. I received a letter on XX/XX/year> saying I would need to go to the store. I called the credit card issuer Citibank again. I spoke with a manager who said they reached out to the store who acknowledged that no load took place but there was no indication that the store would fix the issue. I was told to file a complaint thru any channel I could.
